calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc., a corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288. Telephone: 415-551-3748. Email: swong@sftc.org.

Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Intersection Media LLC.
No appearance by defendant Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc., a corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on October 27, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc., a corporation, was on January 17, 2019 and effectuated on January 27, 2019.
Default as to defendant Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc., a corporation, was entered on March 4, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 11, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 5, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Intersection Media LLC, and against the default defendant Lane Fertility Institute for Education and Research, Inc., a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,747.17.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,019.65.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $532.00.

Total - $48,123.82.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Continued To Aug-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
